case_title: JENNY J. CHEN DDS VS. STEPHEN WONG MR.

docket_entries.description: CORRESPONDENCE LETTER RECEIVED FROM THE DEFENDANT ON DEC-30-2010, RE: TRIAL DATE IN ERROR ON THE CLAIM THAT WAS SERVED TO THE DEFENDANT. DUE TO THE CLERICAL ERROR, COURT CONTINUED TO FEB-07-2011 AT 6:30 PM.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CHEN DDS, JENNY J. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT WONG MR., STEPHEN $1,062.00 PRINCIPAL, $46.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,108.00, DEFENDANT NOT PRESENT. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
COPYING FEES (12 PAGE) PAID BY PLAINTIFF CHEN DDS, JENNY J.
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, AS TO DEFENDANT WONG MR., STEPHEN
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JAN-03-2011 - CONTINUED BY COURT TO FEB-07-2011 AT 6:30 PM IN DEPT. 506
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF CHEN DDS, JENNY J. AS TO DEFENDANT WONG MR., STEPHEN
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED SERVED NOV-26-2010, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT WONG MR., STEPHEN
